info.title: LinkedIn Data Extractor API
info.description: LinkedIn Data Extractor API. Extracts publicly available data from LinkedIn profiles, company pages, and job postings using schema.org JSON-LD and Open Graph meta tags. Works on public pages that don't require login. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Extracts publicly available data from LinkedIn profiles, company pages, and job postings using schema.org JSON-LD and Open Graph meta tags. Works on public pages that don't require login.

url.description: Public HTTP or HTTPS website URL to analyze.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
